plugins.name: ai-skills-core
plugins.description: Install, create, and maintain project-local Codex skills.
defaultPrompt: Create or update a Codex skill.
Set up this repo's skill profile.

plugins.name: workflow-core
plugins.description: General Codex execution, source-of-truth discovery, verification, and completion gates.
defaultPrompt: Find the source of truth before editing.
Check completion gates for this task.

plugins.name: writing-style
plugins.description: Source-faithful writing, scientific prose, Chinese technical prose, and CJK/math PDF rendering.
defaultPrompt: Render and check a CJK math PDF.

skills.name: chinese-prose
skills.description: Chinese technical and scientific prose polishing with CJK/math PDF rendering support.

plugins.name: web-development
plugins.description: Frontend product design, React/Tailwind implementation, Figma handoff, visual assets, and browser QA.
defaultPrompt: Design and build a frontend product.
Audit this frontend with browser tests.

skills.name: frontend-product-design
skills.description: Shape product UX, information architecture, and distinctive frontend visual direction before implementation.

skills.name: react-tailwind-ui
skills.description: Implement React, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, design tokens, and motion polish.

skills.name: frontend-testing-debugging
skills.description: Test and debug rendered frontend apps with browser automation, responsive checks, and accessibility review.

skills.name: frontend-visual-assets
skills.description: Generate images and apply coherent visual themes for frontend surfaces and artifacts.

plugins.name: research-writing
plugins.description: Scientific manuscripts, literature review, citation workflows, research lookup, and research documents.

skills.name: research-paper-workflow
skills.description: Scientific writing, paper workflow orchestration, Nature-style manuscripts, citation verification, LaTeX authoring, and optional semantic literature search.

skills.name: research-documents
skills.description: Work with research PDFs, Word documents, slides, Markdown conversion, figures, and schematics.

plugins.name: statistical-modeling
plugins.description: Bayesian modeling, Python data analysis, and scientific visualization.
defaultPrompt: Help me build and diagnose a Bayesian model.

skills.name: bayesian-modeling
skills.description: Bayesian and statistical modeling workflows with PyMC, diagnostics, simulation, and model reporting.

skills.name: data-analysis-python
skills.description: Python data analysis workflows with EDA, Polars, scikit-learn, and symbolic math.

skills.name: scientific-visualization
skills.description: Scientific plotting and visualization with Matplotlib and Plotly.

plugins.name: bioinformatics
plugins.description: General bioinformatics workflows across databases, single-cell analysis, genomics I/O, and omics analysis.
defaultPrompt: Help me choose the right omics tool.

skills.name: bioinformatics-workflows
skills.description: Common bioinformatics workflows across databases, single-cell analysis, genomics I/O, and omics analysis.

plugins.name: medical-imaging
plugins.description: General medical imaging and AI/ML imaging workflows without project-specific CardiacNexus conventions.
defaultPrompt: Plan a medical imaging ML workflow.
Review this DICOM or NIfTI workflow.

skills.name: medical-imaging-workflows
skills.description: Medical imaging workflows for CMR, DICOM/NIfTI, classical features, deep learning, and pathology imaging.

skills.name: ai-ml-imaging
skills.description: AI/ML support for imaging workflows with PyTorch Lightning and Transformers.

plugins.name: cardiacnexus
plugins.description: Project-specific CardiacNexus feature contracts, pipeline refactors, strain registration, and documentation workflows.

skills.name: cardiacnexus-workflows
skills.description: CardiacNexus feature contracts, pipeline refactors, strain registration, and documentation workflows.
